name: Tom MacDonald
description:
'''Thomas MacDonald''' (born September 21, 1988) is a Canadian rapper, singer-songwriter, record producer and former [[Professional wrestling|professional wrestler]]. His music has been characterized as "[[Make America Great Again|MAGA]] rap", a [[Trumpism|Trumpist]] subgenre of [[political hip-hop]].

He rose to prominence with the release of his 2017 single "Dear Rappers". His 2021 single "[[Fake Woke]]" marked his first appearance on the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]]. His 2024 single, "[[Facts (Tom MacDonald song)|Facts]]" (featuring [[Ben Shapiro]]), debuted at number 16 on the ''Billboard'' Hot 100 and number 42 on the [[Canadian Hot 100]].

Since 2017, MacDonald has been in a relationship with fellow Canadian rapper [[Nova Rockafeller]], who has co-wrote several of his songs and directed their accompanying music videos. The two also created a side project by the name of GFBF.
